stemHtml: Stepped climbs are used on long-distance flights…

options.a: only if the headwind is less or the tailwind is greater than forecast at high altitude.
options.b: to fly as close to the tropopause as possible.
options.c: to fly a profile as close as possible to the optimum altitude as the aeroplane mass reduces.
options.d: for piston-engined aeroplanes only not for jet aeroplanes.
